student_modification: Adapted logic, renamed variables, added paper equation references, restructured for notebook format
declaration: I confirm that all LLM interactions listed here are complete and accurate. All implementation decisions, ablation choices, and interpretations are my own.

interactions.prompt: Which two components of SGD-QN are most interesting to ablate?
interactions.response_summary: Suggested (1) the B update mechanism and (2) the skip scheduling; student validated these choices against paper Section 5

interactions.prompt: How do I modify my SGdqn function to disable the B update?
interactions.response_summary: Suggested adding a no_B_update flag; student implemented and added paper reference

interactions.prompt: What does it mean when ablating skip schedule causes the primal cost to explode?
interactions.response_summary: Explained that naive per-step regularisation over-shrinks w; linked to Section 3 derivation
